title: 1st Gen
description: generation: 1; year_range: 1964-1972; gram_positive: ★★★★★; gram_negative: ★★☆☆☆; beta_lactamase_stability: 低; key_features: 对G+菌强效（金葡菌、链球菌），对G-菌有限，不耐β-内酰胺酶

title: 2nd Gen
description: generation: 2; year_range: 1975-1983; gram_positive: ★★★★☆; gram_negative: ★★★☆☆; beta_lactamase_stability: 中; key_features: G+活性略降，G-谱拓宽（流感嗜血杆菌、卡他莫拉菌），部分覆盖厌氧菌

title: 3rd Gen
description: generation: 3; year_range: 1980-1992; gram_positive: ★★★☆☆; gram_negative: ★★★★★; beta_lactamase_stability: 高; key_features: G-菌谱大幅拓宽（肠杆菌科、铜绿假单胞菌），血脑屏障穿透好，ESBL部分耐药

title: 4th Gen
description: generation: 4; year_range: 1993-1994; gram_positive: ★★★★☆; gram_negative: ★★★★★; beta_lactamase_stability: 极高; key_features: 两性离子结构，快速穿透外膜，抗AmpC β-内酰胺酶，G+恢复接近2代

title: 5th Gen
description: generation: 5; year_range: 2010-至今; gram_positive: ★★★★★; gram_negative: ★★★★★; beta_lactamase_stability: 极高; key_features: 覆盖MRSA/VISA，抗MRSA头孢菌素，ceftaroline为前药
